title: Kinetic Type Machine
description: Canvas typography playground with 6 animation modes — wave, bounce, spiral, gravity, glitch, orbit — plus palette, export, and persistence.
concept: Type any text and watch it come alive across six distinct animation modes. Wave and Bounce move letters rhythmically, Spiral and Orbit throw them into geometric orbits, Gravity drops them from above and bounces them to rest, and Glitch applies chromatic-aberration noise. Five color palettes, speed/amplitude/size controls, PNG export, and all settings saved to localStorage.
features: 6 animation modes: Wave, Bounce, Spiral, Gravity, Glitch, Orbit
5 color palettes: Neon, Fire, Ocean, Pastel, Mono

interaction.click: Buttons change mode, palette, play/pause, export
interaction.touch: All controls touch-friendly; canvas responds to viewport
interaction.keyboard: Type in text input to change content
